name: Famous Amos Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter until light and fluffy with an electric mixer on high speed.
2. Beat in sugars, beating until very creamy.
3. Beat in eggs, then each remaining ingredient except chips and pecans.
4. When dough is smooth, work in chips and pecans using a spoon.
5. Form grape-sized pieces of dough for each cookie, placing them 1 inch apart on an ungreased sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F for 14 minutes or until golden brown. Yield: 12 dozen cookies. Freeze unbaked cookie dough to thaw, shape, and bake in four months.
